scripts.lint: npm run runtime:migration:legacy-imports:check && eslint src --max-warnings 0 && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.runtime:migration:pr5:check: bash -lc "test -f src/widgets/warehouse-editor/model/editor-selectors.ts && ! rg -n '@/entities/layout-version/model/(editor-selectors|editor-store|editor-store-helpers|editor-types|camera-store|mode-store|interaction-store|use-semantic-zoom|storage-workflow-actions)' src && ! rg --files src/entities/layout-version/model | rg '/(editor-selectors|editor-store|editor-store-helpers|editor-types|camera-store|mode-store|interaction-store|use-semantic-zoom|storage-workflow-actions)\\.ts$'"
